channel.title: Matt Parker — Releases
channel.description: Tagged releases across the public archive by Matt Parker.

item.title: Images v0.2.27
item.description: - Archive books now offer a persisted continuous vertical-reading mode for webtoons and long strips; the virtualized reader lazily decodes nearby pages, recycles offscreen pixels, preserves per-book position, exposes cal

item.title: SwiftShot v2.9.0
item.description: SwiftShot v2.9.0 is a substantial reliability, accessibility, security, and workflow release built from the 59 commits after v2.8.0. · - Added macOS- and Windows-style backdrop frames, a scriptable headless capture CLI,

item.title: StormScope v0.110.0
item.description: Surfaced bounded, provider-authored NWS Impact-Based Warning details near alert headlines, including damage threats, official headlines, hail/wind values, storm motion, detection sources, and Wireless Emergency Alert han

item.title: StormScope v0.109.0
item.description: Current release restoring package, deployment, and repository metadata parity. · Highlights: · - Atomic, dry-run-capable release preparation updates all version, cache, changelog, lockfile, badge, and User-Agent surfaces

item.title: ScriptVault v3.19.2
item.description: v3.18.x/3.19.0–3.19.1 scoped the Chromium build to `optional_host_permissions` and enabled a `scopedHostPermissions` gate by default. Together these stranded userscripts behind a **"Site Access Needed"** prompt and refus

item.title: ForceBGTab v0.1.1
item.description: Minimizes the brief foreground **flash** when a tab is sent to the background. · **What changed:** the new tab is now reverted to the opener at the earliest possible signal (`onCreated`, via `openerTabId`) instead of onl

item.title: ForceBGTab v0.1.0
item.description: Initial release of ForceBGTab — an open-source, background-only Manifest V3 extension that forces new tabs opened from links, `target="_blank"`, or `window.open()` to open in the **background** instead of stealing focus.

item.title: SnapCrop v6.89.0
item.description: Capture-first redesign and prompt-free replacement. · - Save & Replace now publishes the edited crop first, then moves the source MediaStore item into the visible `Pictures/trashed/` album instead of Android Trash. Manua

item.title: Images v0.2.26
item.description: - **Loupe and zoom-to-selection are documented** - The `?` keyboard-shortcuts overlay now lists the middle-button loupe and Ctrl+Shift+drag zoom-to-selection gestures so they are discoverable. · - **Serilog updated to 4.

item.title: SnapCrop v6.88.0
item.description: - Adds a deterministic Unfiled screenshot inbox with File, Remind, Keep unfiled, and recoverable Trash actions. · - Adds private local two-screenshot comparison and user-managed optional ML model delivery. · - Adds a gen

item.title: Cataclysm v0.10.3
item.description: - Reimagines the desktop shell, scenario library, results rail, transport, and dark/light themes around a calmer mission-control layout. · - Adds Outcome, Science, and Validation result views with named-place arrival and

item.title: StormScope v0.93.0
item.description: Synchronized two-map comparison with independent radar time, GOES satellite, and NWS hazard sources; low-data, lifecycle, request, tile, decoded-memory, desktop/mobile heap, and synchronization budgets are verified local

item.title: StormScope v0.92.0
item.description: Strict distribution-time RainViewer-v2-compatible radar configuration with exact-origin CSP synchronization, immutable capabilities and attribution, and independent NOAA/NWS MRMS fallback.

item.title: StormScope v0.91.0
item.description: Typed camera provider adapters and extracted shared traveler/geospatial feed protocols, with preserved CLI ordering, atomic failure handling, and byte-identical camera data artifacts.

item.title: Cataclysm v0.10.2
item.description: Hardens the desktop trust and release boundary: explicit main-window permissions for every custom Tauri command, fail-safe mandatory safety guidance when settings persistence is unavailable, and bounded reference capture

item.title: Bookmark-Organizer-Pro v6.12.0
item.description: Portable capture, migration, localization, and product-contract release. Adds bounded authenticated extension capture, real loaded-MV3 verification, resumable imports, versioned snapshot history, RFC 2557 MHTML, pseudo-l

item.title: SnapCrop v6.68.0
item.description: Privacy-safe home widget with Latest, Quick Crop, and Gallery actions that never render screenshot pixels. Focused PDF and crop raster renderers reduce activity complexity without behavior changes. Lossless dimension/lum

item.title: Bookmark-Organizer-Pro v6.11.0
item.description: Portable research workflows and local observability release. Adds authenticated sanitized browser snapshots, template-driven annotation exports, migration fidelity preflights, a local job health ledger, locked package co

item.title: SnapCrop v6.67.0
item.description: Premium interface release: status-led Home, focused Edit action, structured quick tools and Recent states, complete light/dark design tokens, accessible full-row Settings toggles, recoverable Gallery empty states, a simp

item.title: Cataclysm v0.10.0
item.description: Cataclysm now opens in a progressively disclosed simulator workspace. Simple keeps the scenario, live globe, Run & Watch journey, timeline, and outcomes dominant. Customize reveals a small understandable control set. Adv

item.title: Cataclysm v0.9.1
item.description: Run & Watch is now a guided Prepare, Calculate, Watch, and Understand journey. Outcomes open automatically, cached results replay immediately, manual controls remain available, solver failures provide local retry, and th

item.title: Cataclysm v0.9.0
item.description: Universal scenario library and Quick Start milestone. One persistent rail now spans tsunami reference events and complete direct asteroid/nuclear what-if scenarios, with preview-only camera framing, one explicit Run & Wa

item.title: ClearCut v3.74.117
item.description: Fixes Merge Next shifting later clips backward into overlaps. Includes regression coverage and retains the v3.74.116 timeline playback, preview spacing, delete control, silent autosave, and snoozable editing suggestions.

item.title: ClearCut v3.74.116
item.description: Cut playback continuity release. Manual cuts keep the prepared Media3 timeline instead of resetting the decoder; stored player listeners attach during lazy creation; transport state follows actual playback; replay restar

item.title: ClearCut v3.74.115
item.description: Timeline editor and preview hardening. The preview consumes flexible phone height; Cut uses the live playhead and preserves playback; selected clips expose a clear Delete action; ripple deletes retain preview position; a

item.title: ClearCut v3.74.114
item.description: Preview-space and edit-playback release. The preview now consumes flexible phone height while the bounded timeline and tool dock remain anchored together. Split uses the live frame position, timeline rebuilds resume atom

item.title: ClearCut v3.74.113
item.description: Timeline and preview reliability release. Linked trims and splits are atomic across A/V pairs; Beat Sync and Cut Assistant reject unsafe cuts and preserve marker alignment. Retimed clips now seek and play against the cor

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.67
item.description: Packaging release — adds **portable, install-free executables**. · - **Portable single-file builds**: `win-x64` and `win-arm64` portable ZIPs, each containing self-contained single-file `HostsGuard.App.exe`, `HostsGuard.

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.66
item.description: 2026-07-10 roadmap drain — nine items, 1063 tests green. · - **IP-format blocklists → firewall rules**: subscribe HTTPS sources of IPv4/IPv6/CIDR entries (e.g. HaGeZi ips/doh, ips/tif) enforced as chunked `HG_IPBlock_*`

item.title: SurfaceMedic v0.2.1
item.description: Fixes thermal scans that reported matches without revealing the populated results table. Collection visibility now tracks live item counts, and explicit grid columns prevent duplicated fields. Verified with 9/9 tests, a

item.title: SurfaceMedic v0.2.0
item.description: SurfaceMedic v0.2.0 introduces a premium .NET 9 WPF/MVVM desktop shell with complete dark and light themes, seven purpose-built views, a typed asynchronous Windows adapter, persistent settings and logs, a branded executa

item.title: AppManagerNG v0.6.5
item.description: - Privileged-server sessions now keep secrets device-local, rebind safely after port changes, and roll back failed transitions. · - Startup authentication, component-rule reset, archive handling, and destructive-operatio

item.title: sysadmindoc.github.io v0.22.0
item.description: Premium product-quality pass across the full portfolio: stronger navigation and responsive hierarchy, accessible dark/light contrast and focus states, resilient search and sharing recovery, clearer empty/loading/error/su

item.title: ImgConverter v3.5.0
item.description: - Reframed the desktop workflow as **Source → Output recipe → Batch summary** with responsive wide and compact layouts. · - Added a unified line-icon system, new ImgConverter app icon, clearer hierarchy, progressive disc

item.title: Bookmark-Organizer-Pro v6.10.0
item.description: Premium workspace redesign and interaction-quality release. Rebuilds the desktop first-run experience, collection pulse, contextual actions, and assistant rail; hardens live themes, focus behavior, WCAG contrast, and non

item.title: ScriptVault v3.19.1
item.description: Premium workbench parity release: canonical navigation, deeper dashboard destinations, reliable settings autosave, recoverable editor fallback, polished compact surfaces, four-theme rendered evidence, and verified Chrome

item.title: Wingetter v6.2.0
item.description: Premium GUI and UX release with a redesigned discovery workspace, responsive catalog, persistent reviewed-selection panel, corrected dark/light theming, keyboard and screen-reader improvements, polished dialogs, determin

item.title: BetterTTS v0.19.0
item.description:
Premium product-quality release for the web and Windows editions.

Highlights:
- Recoverable Queue and Library deletion with Undo
- Complete mobile workspace rail and editor-level Generate action
- Keyboard tab navi

item.title: Images v0.2.25
item.description: Premium image-first viewer redesign with a compact 52px rail, dominant canvas, focused Details inspector, streamlined gallery and settings hierarchy, and reduced permanent chrome. Includes WPF dispatcher reliability and

item.title: ScriptVault v3.19.0
item.description: Professional workbench redesign with a premium graphite-and-emerald dashboard, live vault metrics, contextual script inspection, unified popup/side-panel/install/DevTools surfaces, and browser-rendered visual regression

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.65
item.description: Premium WPF workbench redesign with a vector product identity, continuous primary and secondary navigation, refined dark/light surface hierarchy, semantic alert and focus states, unified themed dialogs, localized About s

item.title: Network_Security_Auditor v5.3.1
item.description: Adds live assessment save-status feedback and protects Save state and Load state while scans or report exports mutate audit data. All persisted check fields, scan results, profile changes, and theme changes now mark the

item.title: BetterTTS v0.17.0
item.description: Premium production-workspace redesign for the web and Windows desktop app. Adds persistent workspace navigation, real Output/Queue/Library tabs, integrated output transport, compact properties controls, neutral dark/ligh

item.title: Network_Security_Auditor v5.3.0
item.description: Premium C# security posture workstation redesign with a resizable checks and evidence inspector, truthful readiness and unscanned states, stronger accessibility, recoverable scan failures, deterministic GUI capture, and

item.title: RES-Slim v0.15.1
item.description: Old.reddit-focused fork of Reddit Enhancement Suite. Chrome MV3 + Firefox MV2. 494 contract tests. Bundles everything since v0.14.1 (v0.14.2, v0.15.0, v0.15.1). · - New `pageTheme` module (disabled by default) — an opt-i

item.title: Network_Security_Auditor v5.2.9
item.description: Reliability fix release. C# GUI scans now generate and open the HTML report automatically after successful completion, and CF02 egress checks no longer abandon timed-out socket connect tasks that can surface as unobserve

item.title: BetterTTS v0.15.0
item.description: Changed: Reworked the studio shell into a professional workstation layout with a six-tile command summary, side-by-side script/output workbench, tabbed waveform-style output deck, denser queue/library treatment, refreshe

item.title: Astra-Deck v4.46.34
item.description: Polishes the extension settings overlay into an executive command deck: red hairline shell, top command search, compact navigation rail, denser setting rows, right-side status/profile/health inspector, and persistent bot

item.title: Network_Security_Auditor v5.2.8
item.description: C# rewrite v5.2.8 and PowerShell v4.11.2 audit hardening release. · - Hardened generated HTML links, branding contact email handling, and local import file-size limits. · - Improved CF01 SYSVOL scanning bounds, saved-sta

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.62
item.description: Security and reliability audit release. Hardened CSV exports against spreadsheet formula injection; fixed repeated support-bundle export collisions and empty-log diagnostics; clarified app/service version-mismatch errors
